Instance of PanelManager used to manage panels in the application.

The panel manager that manages different panels in the game.

Plays the specified audio file.

played - Variable in class model.Player
The number of games played by the player.

Player - Class in model
The Player class represents a player in a blackjack game.

Player.Builder - Class in model

playerName - Variable in class controller.NewGamePanelController

playerName - Variable in class model.Player
The name of the player.
possibleBets(Player) - Method in class model.ModelManager

pressButtonX(int) - Method in class controller.LoadGameController
Handles the process of deleting a save slot, updates the saves file, and refreshes the menu with updated save information.
